    'no_phd2_data': '没有PHD2导星日志数据可用。',
    'zoom_full': '完整',
    'zoom_in': '缩放',
    'no_dither_data': '没有偏移数据可用。',
    'no_autofocus_data': '没有自动对焦数据可用。',
    'calculating_month': '正在计算 %\(total\)d 月中的第 %\(current\)d 月...',

    'confirm_bulk_action': '确定要对 %\(count\)d 个对象进行 %\(action\)s 操作吗？',
    'fetching_details_for': '正在获取 %\(name\)s 的详细信息...',
}

# Find if entry exists, update if not
for entry in po:
    if entry.msgid in NEW_TRANSLATIONS and not entry.msgstr:
        entry.msgstr = NEW_TRANSLATIONS[entry.msgid]
        print\(f"Added: {entry.msgid}"\)

po.save\(\)
print\("Chinese translations added successfully"\)
EOF)

Bash(/tmp/new_wbpp_parser.py << 'EOF'
# --- WBPP Log Parser -- Simplified Version ---

WBPP_PATTERNS = {
    'timestamp': re.compile\(r'^\\[?\(\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}\\s+\\d{2}:\\d{2}:\\d{2}\)\\]?'\),
    'pi_version': re.compile\(r'PixInsight\\s+Core\\s+\([\\d.]+\)'\),
    'wbpp_version': re.compile\(r'Weighted\\s+Batch\\s+Preprocessing\\s+Script\\s+\([\\d.]+\)'\),
    'banner': re.compile\(r'\\*{8,}\\\\s*\([A-Z][A-Z\\s]*\)\\*{5,}'\),
    'size': re.compile\(r'SIZE\\s*[:=]\\s*\(.+\)', re.IGNORECASE\),
    'binning': re.compile\(r'BINNING\\s*[:=]\\s*\(.+\)', re.IGNORECASE\),
    'filter': re.compile\(r'FILTER\\s*[:=]\\s*\(.+\)', re.IGNORECASE\),
    'exposure': re.compile\(r'EXPOSURE\\s*[:=]\\s*\(.+\)', re.IGNORECASE\),
    'mode': re.compile\(r'MODE\\s*[:=]\\s*\(.+\)', re.IGNORECASE\),
    'rejection_method': re.compile\(r'REJECTION\\s+METHOD\\s*[:=]\\s*\(.+\)', re.IGNORECASE\),
}
EOF)
